key_decisions.original_text: All devnet-7 EIPs ratified SFI; PRs to update EIP statuses will be opened
EIP-8334 Bundled Attestation Propagation: PFI for Hegota; will be made required at fork even though backwards compatible
key_decisions.context: will be made required at fork despite backwards compatibility

key_decisions.original_text: EIP-8321 Hash-Chain RANDAO: no PFI; consensus that full PQ approach must be decided before enshrining any iteration; async discussion to continue in Post Quantum Discord channel
key_decisions.context: full PQ approach must be decided first; async discussion continues
